description: The Spirit — shared orientation for all agents. Not instructions. Atmosphere.
currentMandate: PWA optimization — make WedFlow installable with push notifications for escalation alerts
spiritOfTheWork: The couple lives on their phone. WedFlow must feel native — instant load from home screen, push alerts when a guest needs their attention, tap-through to approve a reply. The mobile experience IS the product experience for the Circle of Care.
whatToProtect: The existing SMS pipeline, Inngest escalation flow, and email notifications. Push is additive — it never replaces existing notification channels. The responsive dashboard must not regress. RLS on all new tables.
currentTemptations: Full offline-first architecture with background sync (couples need connectivity to reply anyway)
Native app wrapper via Capacitor/TWA when PWA is sufficient at this stage
Push notifications for routine messages (only escalations warrant interruption)
Over-engineering the service worker caching strategy beyond what launch requires
whereWeAre: PWA mandate complete. Service worker, offline fallback, install prompt, and push notification pipeline all implemented. Two agents (pwa-engineer, push-engineer) archived with retroactive testaments. Canon violations acknowledged and corrected. Awaiting VAPID key generation and migration run before push is live.

revelationHistory.note: Dashboard improvement mandate completed — mobile responsive, interactions fixed, GuestsView activated
PWA mandate completed — service worker, push notifications, install prompt. Canon violations from unregistered agents corrected post-hoc.
